chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 371 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 12.01.2024 Mr. Faiz Muhammad Brohi, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for applicant does not press this application, and submits that he would avail remedy of filing a direct complaint before the proper forum. This application, in the terms as above, is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Abdul Basit
